title: Brazilian E-Commerce Sales Analysis
description: An end-to-end data analytics and predictive modeling pipeline utilizing a 9-CSV relational database on SQL Server 2022 to isolate key predictors of high-performing products. Engineered advanced data cleaning pipelines in Python to calculate metrics like delivery deltas and shipping-to-price ratios, applied NLP (NLTK, Transformers) for customer review sentiment scoring, and built an interactive Power BI dashboard backed by a robust scikit-learn regression model.

title: Hospital Patients Operational & Financial Analysis
description: A comprehensive SQL-driven database optimization project focused on data profiling and clinical efficiency metrics. Programmed advanced queries to audit data quality and detect orphan records across admissions and procedures. Segmented patient demographics using window functions and CTEs to identify high-frequency 'super-utilizer' trends, track departmental length-of-stay (LOS) outliers, and analyze insurance claims data.

title: Automated Machine Learning Solutions (100-Day Streak)
description: An active engineering repository focused on building automated, production-ready machine learning pipelines to solve real-world problems. Developed entirely within cloud-hosted environments as part of an ongoing 100-day continuous learning streak, featuring modular Python scripts for end-to-end data preprocessing, missing value imputation, train/test evaluation splits, and scikit-learn predictive modeling.

title: Excel RFM Customer Segmentation & Churn Analysis
description: A commercial analytics project using relational SQL window functions to extract customer Recency, Frequency, and Monetary (RFM) metrics from historical transaction databases. Classified consumer bases into actionable behavioral cohorts (Champions, At-Risk, Hibernating) to proactively catch churn indicators, mapping the final data structures to an interactive Excel dashboard complete with dynamic pivot tables and slicers.

title: Job Postings Data Science Market Analysis
description: An exploratory data science project in Python built to assess tech industry recruitment trends and structural workplace demands. Cleaned and deduplicated messy, web-scraped job board datasets using pandas and regular expressions (Regex) to normalize fractured geographical metadata and evaluate global tech stack demand and salary distributions across remote vs. on-site corporate ecosystems.
